title: One Hundred and One Nights
original_title: Les Cent et Une Nuits de Simon Cinéma
overview: Monsieur Cinema, a hundred years old, lives alone in a large villa. His memories fade away, so he engages a young woman to tell him stories about all the movies ever made.
